zh.lifeSummary: 當Joseph John Wheelock於1563年10月7日出生在英國史洛普爾多林頓時，他的父親Humphrey Wheelock50歲，母親Margaret Winter29歲。他於1595年5月3日與Elizabeth Rogers在英國史洛普爾多林頓結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1639年9月11日在英國斯塔福爾比度爾福享年75歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾比度爾福。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joseph John Wheelock于1563年10月7日出生在英国史洛普爾多林頓时，他的父亲Humphrey Wheelock50岁，母亲Margaret Winter29岁。他于1595年5月3日与Elizabeth Rogers在英国史洛普爾多林頓结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1639年9月11日在英国斯塔福爾比度爾福享年75岁，埋葬在英国英格兰斯塔福爾比度爾福。

nameMeanings.name: Wheelock
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Worcestershire and Staffordshire): habitational name from a place so named in Cheshire. The placename is derived from the river Wheelock; the river name means ‘winding river’, from British Suilāco-.

nameMeanings.name: Joseph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the biblical Hebrew name Yosef, meaning ‘(God) shall add (another son)’. This was borne by the favourite son of Jacob, whose brothers became jealous of him and sold him into slavery (Genesis 37). He was taken to Egypt, where he rose to become chief steward to Pharaoh, and was eventually reconciled to his brothers when they came to buy corn during a seven-year famine (Genesis 43–7). In the New Testament Joseph is the name of the husband of the Virgin Mary. It is also borne by a rich Jew, Joseph of Arimathea (Matthew 27:57; Mark 15:43; Luke 23:50; John 19:38), who took Jesus down from the Cross, wrapped him in a shroud, and buried him in a rock tomb. According to medieval legend, Joseph of Arimathea brought the Holy Grail to Britain. The name was uncommon in Britain in the Middle Ages but was revived in the mid 16th century and had become popular by the 1630s, remaining so ever since.

variants.name: Josef
meanings: , Dutch, Scandinavian, and Czech spelling of   Joseph  , now also in use in the English‐speaking world.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Joseph John Wheelock was born on 7 October 1563, in Dorrington, Shropshire, England, his father, Humphrey Wheelock, was 50 and his mother, Margaret Winter, was 29. He married Elizabeth Rogers on 3 May 1595, in Dorrington, Shropshire, England. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 11 September 1639, in Biddulph, Staffordshire, England, at the age of 75, and was buried in Biddulph, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joseph John Wheelock est né le 7 octobre 1563, à Dorrington, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Humphrey Wheelock, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Margaret Winter, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Rogers le 3 mai 1595, à Dorrington, Shropshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 11 septembre 1639, à Biddulph, Staffordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterré à Biddulph, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joseph John Wheelockが1563年10月7日にイギリスシュロプシュアイアドーリントンで生まれた時，父Humphrey Wheelockは50歳，母Margaret Winterは29歳であった。1595年5月3日にイギリスシュロプシュアイアドーリントンでElizabeth Rogersと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1639年9月11日にイギリススタフォードシュアイアビッドウルフで75歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアビッドウルフにて埋葬された。

ko.Dedham, Norfolk, Province of Massachuset: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 캔아다 웨스트 노르폴크
ko.lifeSummary: Joseph John Wheelock(이)가 1563년 10월 7일 영국 슈럽실르 도링턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Humphrey Wheelock(은)는 50세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Winter(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1595년 5월 3일 영국 슈럽실르 도링턴에서 Elizabeth Rogers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1639년 9월 11일 영국 스태퍼드실르 비드프에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 비드프에 묻혔다.

pt.Dedham, Norfolk, Province of Massachuset: Norfolk, Canada West, British Colonial America
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joseph John Wheelock nasceu em 7 de outubro de 1563, em Dorrington, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Humphrey Wheelock, tinha 50 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Winter, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Rogers em 3 de maio de 1595, em Dorrington, Shropshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 11 de setembro de 1639, em Biddulph, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, com 75 anos, e foi sepultado em Biddulph, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Dedham, Norfolk, Province of Massachuset: норфолк, канада вест, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joseph John Wheelock родился 7 октября 1563 г. в местности доррингтон, шропшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Humphrey Wheelock было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Winter, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Rogers 3 мая 1595 г. в местности доррингтон, шропшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер 11 сентября 1639 г. в местности биддулф, стаффордшир, Англия в возрасте 75 лет и был похоронен в местности биддулф, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joseph John Wheelock nació el 7 de octubre de 1563, en Dorrington, Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Humphrey Wheelock, tenía 50 años y su mamá, Margaret Winter, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Rogers el 3 de mayo de 1595, en Dorrington, Shropshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 11 de septiembre de 1639, en Biddulph, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 75 años, y fue sepultado en Biddulph, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
